target:
# Search for larger/better table screenshots - look at the software/screenshots sections
curl --max-time 30 --resolve "web.archive.org:443:207.241.237.3" "https://web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx?url=fulltiltpoker.com/images/*&output=text&limit=200&fl=timestamp,original,mimetype&filter=mimetype:image/jpeg&filter=statuscode:200&from=20080101&to=20110101" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "table\|poker-soft\|screenshot\|game\|play\|holdem\|hand" | head -20
